title: Feline +- (Origin)
description: (NEEDS ORIGINS + PEHKUI) the feline origin but more complicated
body:
(VERY inspired in feline+ made by dansotherclone)
(requires pehkui)
These small milkaholic creatures always land safely on their feet, are experts in hunting and scare away creepers with their cat-like appearance.

Changes I added (this pack includes the normal default feline origin's pros and cons):

🟢 Hunting Leap (Primary): Leap high up towards the nearest prey!, or to escape, similar to foxes. Uses two hunger shanks, requires you to sneak.

🟢 Natural Resilience (Secondary): Cats use purring to keep going even in pain, and so can you. Uses 4 hunger shanks.

🟢 Milk-Lover: Drinking milk gives you Strength for 2 minutes.

🟢 Nocturnal: You can see better in the dark.

🟡 Special Diet: Restricted to fruits/vegetables and fish, of which raw fishes gives 4 more food and cooking them gives more saturation and less food, while pufferfishes remove all effects instead.

🔴 Small: You're a little smaller than normal, making armor slightly less effective.
